Password At Least 6 Characters Both Fields Are Empty
Email Field Was An Empty Email Was Invalid Password Field Was Empty Password Reset Failed , Check Email Successfully User Password Reset
All Fields Are Empty User Name Field Was Empty Mobile No Field Was Empty Mobile No Must Be 10 Characters Email Field Was Empty Email Was Invalid Password Field Was Empty New User Account Was Created New user Account Creation Failed The Email Already Used

Internet Is Needed
All Fields Are Empty Date Was Missing, So Select Date Expense Amount Was Missing, So Enter Amount Select Category Select Payment Type Successfully Expense Details Are Stored Something Wrong, Expense Details Are Not Stored

successfully Income Was Edited" Edit Income Failed"
